settings.heading: Essentials, evidence-first.
settings.subheading: A small catalogue of things that actually work. Each item selected for its evidence, its usefulness, and its value over time.

settings.title: Health.
settings.description: Sleep, oral care, sun protection, air and water quality. Every item is backed by research you can read.

settings.title: Finance.
settings.description: Fraud protection, energy savings, long-term investing. Every item pays for itself, or it isn't on the list.

settings.heading: Health.
settings.description: Small, durable items that measurably improve sleep, oral care, breathing and skin.

settings.heading: Finance.
settings.description: Tools that pay for themselves through avoided cost, improved returns, or lower utility bills.

settings.heading: We only sell what actually works.
settings.body: No trends. No sponsorships. No placement fees. Every item we list is chosen because the evidence for it is genuinely strong — or because the financial case is unusually clear. If we can't defend a product in writing, we don't sell it.

settings.title: Scientific backing.
settings.body: Health items must have peer-reviewed evidence of a meaningful effect. Weak or mixed evidence is rejected or labelled clearly.

settings.title: Real-world usefulness.
settings.body: An item must solve a problem someone actually has. Novelty alone is not enough. Daily value over years is the test.

settings.title: Financial efficiency.
settings.body: Every item must offer clear value against its best alternative — whether that is a major brand, a recurring cost, or doing nothing.

settings.heading: Three questions we ask about every item.
Members pay ten percent less.
settings.body: Free to join. Requires an account and notification permission. No tiers, no games, no gating of categories.

settings.heading: A fixed 50% markup on every item. Two years of warranty. No price games.
Every item, measured against the brand you'd otherwise buy.
settings.body: We do not hide from comparison. Every product on Boring carries a side-by-side against the major-brand equivalent — price, materials, performance, warranty. No spin.

settings.heading: Invite others. Earn future credit.
settings.body: Members earn 10% of the profit on any order they refer, as store credit. Elegant. Slow. Compounds. If you value what we do here, this is how we grow.
